global_description: A small, plump songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a distinctive white throat patch and a striped head with black and white markings. The wings and back are brown with streaks, and the underparts are pale gray.

part_details.head: Black and white stripes with a prominent white throat patch.
part_details.wings: Brown with darker streaks, medium length.

spatial_relations: The white throat patch is centrally located on the lower head.
The striped head is positioned above the pale gray underparts.
The brown wings extend from the sides of the body.
